## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior, including the file/code snippet analyzed.

## Expected behavior

What you expected HaluGuard to report (or not report).

## Actual behavior

What HaluGuard actually reported (or how it failed).
